name: Tech Startup Profile
description: Modern, innovative tone suitable for technology startups and venture capital communications

tone_guidelines.sentence_style: clear and direct with occasional technical complexity

examples.mission_statement: We're disrupting the enterprise software landscape through AI-powered automation that scales with your business growth.
examples.product_description: Our revolutionary platform leverages machine learning to optimize workflows, reduce operational costs by 40%, and accelerate digital transformation initiatives.
examples.investor_pitch: With a total addressable market of $50 billion and early adoption rates exceeding industry averages by 300%, we're positioned to capture significant market share within the next 24 months.
